allow: Bash(ssh user-home@192.168.1.37 "sudo git -C /opt/homelab pull && sudo chown -R user-home:user-home /opt/homelab")

Bash(ssh user-home@192.168.1.37 "grep -q HOMEPAGE_ALLOWED_HOSTS /opt/homelab/vm-proxy-02/.env && echo 'key exists' || echo 'MISSING — adding'; grep -q HOMEPAGE_ALLOWED_HOSTS /opt/homelab/vm-proxy-02/.env || echo 'HOMEPAGE_ALLOWED_HOSTS=192.168.1.37:3000,home.home.loc' >> /opt/homelab/vm-proxy-02/.env")
Bash(ssh user-home@192.168.1.37 "systemctl is-active dnsmasq && dig vw.home.loc @192.168.1.37 +short")
Bash(ssh user-home@192.168.1.37 "systemctl is-active dnsmasq; nslookup vw.home.loc 192.168.1.37 2>/dev/null || host vw.home.loc 192.168.1.37 2>/dev/null || cat /etc/dnsmasq.d/*.conf 2>/dev/null")
Bash(ssh user-home@192.168.1.37 "curl -s http://localhost:81/api/tokens -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\\"identity\\":\\"'\\"$\(grep NPM_ADMIN_EMAIL /opt/homelab/vm-proxy-02/.env)

Bash(ssh user-home@192.168.1.37 'TOKEN=$\(curl -s http://localhost:81/api/tokens -X POST -H '\\''Content-Type: application/json'\\'' -d "{\\"identity\\":\\"$\(grep NPM_ADMIN_EMAIL /opt/homelab/vm-proxy-02/.env | cut -d= -f2\)\\",\\"secret\\":\\"$\(grep NPM_ADMIN_PASSWORD /opt/homelab/vm-proxy-02/.env | cut -d= -f2\)\\"}" | grep -o '\\''"token":"[^"]*"'\\'' | cut -d'\\''"'\\'' -f4\) && curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" http://localhost:81/api/nginx/proxy-hosts | python3 -c "import sys,json; hosts=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(h.get\('\\''domain_names'\\''\), h.get\('\\''forward_host'\\''\), h.get\('\\''forward_port'\\''\)\) for h in hosts]" 2>/dev/null || echo '\\''no proxy hosts or parse error'\\''')

Bash(ssh user-home@192.168.1.37 'TOKEN=$\(curl -s http://localhost:81/api/tokens -X POST -H '\\''Content-Type: application/json'\\'' -d "{\\"identity\\":\\"$\(grep NPM_ADMIN_EMAIL /opt/homelab/vm-proxy-02/.env | cut -d= -f2\)\\",\\"secret\\":\\"$\(grep NPM_ADMIN_PASSWORD /opt/homelab/vm-proxy-02/.env | cut -d= -f2\)\\"}" | grep -o '\\''"token":"[^"]*"'\\'' | cut -d'\\''"'\\'' -f4\) && curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" http://localhost:81/api/nginx/proxy-hosts | python3 -c "import sys,json; hosts=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(h.get\('\\''domain_names'\\''\), '\\''ssl_id:'\\'', h.get\('\\''certificate_id'\\''\), '\\''force_ssl:'\\'', h.get\('\\''ssl_forced'\\''\)\) for h in hosts if '\\''vw.home.loc'\\'' in h.get\('\\''domain_names'\\'',[]\)]" 2>/dev/null')

Bash(ssh user-home@192.168.1.37 'TOKEN=$\(curl -s http://localhost:81/api/tokens -X POST -H '\\''Content-Type: application/json'\\'' -d "{\\"identity\\":\\"$\(grep NPM_ADMIN_EMAIL /opt/homelab/vm-proxy-02/.env | cut -d= -f2\)\\",\\"secret\\":\\"$\(grep NPM_ADMIN_PASSWORD /opt/homelab/vm-proxy-02/.env | cut -d= -f2\)\\"}" | grep -o '\\''"token":"[^"]*"'\\'' | cut -d'\\''"'\\'' -f4\) && curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" http://localhost:81/api/nginx/certificates/1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; c=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('\\''provider:'\\'', c.get\('\\''provider'\\''\), '\\''expires:'\\'', c.get\('\\''expires_on'\\''\), '\\''domains:'\\'', c.get\('\\''domain_names'\\''\)\)" 2>/dev/null')
